name: Cookie-Based Auth Bypass
description: A 'remember me' cookie is used in a SQL query to restore user sessions. Forge the cookie value with SQL injection to bypass authentication and access the admin panel.
briefing: SparkMail, a webmail client, has a 'remember me' feature that stores a session token in a cookie. When the user revisits, the app uses this cookie value directly in a SQL query to look up the session. The login form itself is properly parameterized, but the cookie-based session restoration is vulnerable. Forge a malicious cookie value to bypass authentication and access the admin mailbox, which contains the flag.
objective: Exploit the vulnerable cookie-based session lookup to bypass authentication and read the flag in the admin mailbox.
author: h4ck0rman
